audits.name: public copy separates runnable demo from optional live DataHub
audits.evidence: The repo, judge notes, and live page disclose that the submitted artifact is runnable locally while the live GMS path is optional.

audits.name: no forbidden overclaims on public surfaces
audits.evidence: No public surface uses the checked phrases for live posting, credential requirements, or automatic customer outreach.

audits.name: live DataHub remains an explicit opt-in local action
audits.evidence: Generated artifacts say judging does not require live DataHub, and the only live post command targets a local GMS with an explicit flag.

audits.name: external side effects stay bounded
audits.evidence: The local adapter smoke test records no external side effects, and the policy matrix preserves blocked outreach and scraping actions.

audits.name: feedback and limitations are documented
audits.evidence: Organizer feedback, simulated-vs-live scope, opt-in local posting, and implementation limits are visible before judging.

explicit_boundaries: The demo is runnable without DataHub credentials or Docker.
The live DataHub post path is local-only, uses Rest.li ingestProposal bodies, and requires DATAHUB_GMS_URL plus --post.
The agent blocks or approval-gates external outreach when contact or owner context is missing.
Local smoke tests write receipts only and report external_side_effects as none.
